Metadata.title: Restaurant Map Generator
Metadata.description: Generate ranked, shareable restaurant maps from real Google Places.

Home.title: Restaurant Map Generator
Home.description: Sign in with Google, set structured filters, and generate a private ranked map of real restaurant places that open directly in Google Maps.

ranking.title: Rating-first ranking
ranking.text: Results are sorted by highest rating, with review count used as the tie-breaker.

private.title: Private by default
private.text: Saved maps belong to the creator unless sharing is explicitly enabled.

sharing.title: Collaborative sharing
sharing.text: Use view-only links for publishing or editable links so signed-in collaborators join the same map.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.description: Use Google to create private restaurant maps and manage share links.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Owned maps and collaborative maps shared with you.
Dashboard.emptyDescription: Create your first ranked restaurant map.

CreateMap.title: Create Map
CreateMap.description: Answer the guided form. Only Google Places restaurants are searched.
CreateMap.rulesText: Restaurants are filtered on the backend, ranked by highest rating, and review count breaks ties. Generated maps are private until sharing is enabled.

errors.locationUnavailable: Browser location is not available. Enter a location manually.
errors.locationDenied: Location permission was denied. Enter an address or place name manually.
errors.centerRequired: Choose current location or enter a location manually.

MapView.collaborativeBadge: Collaborative edits affect the original map.
MapView.deleteDescription: Delete this map, its pins, collaborators, and active share links.
MapView.emptyRestaurants: No restaurants matched these filters. Try a wider radius, lower rating, or smaller review minimum.
MapView.pinSummary: {rating} stars · {count, plural, one {# review} other {# reviews}}
MapView.viewOnlyNotice: Viewers can inspect this map from the link. It will not appear in their dashboard unless they are added later.

shareDialog.title: Share this map
shareDialog.description: Control who can access the original restaurant map.
shareDialog.privateDescription: Only you can access this map.
shareDialog.viewTitle: Anyone with the link can view
shareDialog.viewDescription: People can view this shared map.
shareDialog.editTitle: Anyone with the link can edit
shareDialog.editDescription: People can collaboratively edit this original map.

collaborativeNotice.title: This map is collaborative.
collaborativeNotice.text: Changes affect the same shared map for everyone.

DeleteMap.title: Delete Map
DeleteMap.warning: Are you sure you want to delete this map?
DeleteMap.sharedWarning: This map is shared with collaborators. Deleting it will remove access for everyone and make the map unavailable to collaborators.
DeleteMap.permanentWarning: This permanently deletes the map, its pins, memberships, and share link access.
